title: Minor Tick Units ( MinorTickUnits)
text: Minor Tick Units ( MinorTickUnits) Number of units that are displayed between two major ticks. The default is 5 . MinorTickUnits = Number Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description For example, in the Meter widget, the default range is set from 0-100. When Minor Tick Units is set to 5 , there are 4 ticks between the annotated tick marks. Figure 1. Meter Widget with Default Values Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "MajorTickUnits=10 ; MinorTickUnits=2" Copy Figure 2. Meter Widget Applies To umeter (Meter) uslider (Slider) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
